channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: From Pakistan to Egypt, Iran war drives up fuel prices in the Global South
item.description: Developing economies in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East are bearing the brunt of surging energy costs.

item.title: Parsi: No deal ‘’without both sides giving something to the other’
item.description: Trita Parsi argues that Iran is unlikely to agree to end the war without sanctions relief.

item.title: New Zealand footballers willing to play Iran World Cup match outside US
item.description: The teams are set to play on June 15 in Los Angeles, but Iran has threatened to boycott its matches due to the war.

item.title: What we know about the US’s 15-point plan Iran proposal
item.description: US media reports the Trump administration has proposed a temporary ceasefire and a 15-point plan to end the war on Iran.

item.title: Iran says ‘non-hostile’ ships can pass safely through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tehran's statement on opening of key waterway comes as US President Trump says talks are taking place to end the war.

item.title: Philippine president declares energy emergency as impact of Iran war felt
item.description: Transport unions say emergency declaration a 'superficial band-aid' that does not address root cause of fuel crisis.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump again says talks under way; 12 killed in south Tehran
item.description: US-Israeli strikes on Iran continue despite claim of talks, with at least 12 killed, 28 wounded in one attack on Tehran.

item.title: Trump keeps up claims of talks with ‘the right people’ in Iran
item.description: US reportedly engaged in backchannel efforts, though Israel apparently not on same page, and military buildup continues.

item.title: Explosion, fire at Erbil high-rise amid Iranian attacks
item.description: Video shows a large explosion and fire at a high-rise building in Erbil reportedly near the US Consulate.

item.title: Arms manufacturer thrives amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Elbit Systems has seen rapid growth as wars intensify across Iran, Palestine, and Lebanon.
